title: Topological Phases Core Unresolved Queue
summary: Topic-level unresolved items that remain after promoting the current Witten, TKNN, Haldane, Jackiw-Rebbi, and Callan-Harvey flagship theorem families.

items.notes: The stronger cited-paper proof route for Nielsen-Ninomiya is still missing.
The continuum-anomaly intuition still needs stronger cited-source separation from the lattice proof.
The local theorem exists, but original-source TKNN and Haldane recovery is still open.
The local theorem exists, but original-source Jackiw-Rebbi and Callan-Harvey recovery is still open.
The topic source network is active, but it still depends on the unresolved cited-paper recovery routes above.
